---
name: Spec clarification or practitioner feedback
about: Ask for a clarification, or share whether the profile maps to real operational risk
title: ''
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

## What kind of feedback

- [ ] A part of the profile is unclear or ambiguous
- [ ] The profile does not map cleanly to a real operational scenario
- [ ] An adoption blocker: something missing before you could use or reference this
- [ ] Positioning or framing is confusing

## Context

Your environment or use case, at whatever level of detail you can share. For
example: AI governance, security review, platform engineering, or compliance
work.

## The feedback

The clarification you need, or the gap you see. Quote the affected text in
`spec.md`, `verifier-conformance.md`, or the canonical site where you can.

## What would resolve it

What a good answer or change would look like. A clearer sentence, a worked
example, a new FAQ entry, or a profile change.
